display.purpose: Hero headline only, one per page.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Ink-tinted lift, never combined with a border on the same edge.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default entrance/hover easing across the public site.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-pill CTA, charcoal fill, lifts and glows on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #16181d; color: #fff; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(37,99,235,0.35), 0 24px 48px -16px rgba(37,99,235,0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost pill button, hairline border, tints blue on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #cfd1d6; color: #26282f; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.05); border-color: #93c5fd; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Flat, hairline-bordered card for portfolio grid items.
components.css: .ds-card-project { background: #fff; border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid #e8e9eb; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card-project:hover { border-color: #93c5fd; } .ds-card-project-media { aspect-ratio: 4/5; background: #f6f6f7; } .ds-card-project-title { margin: 12px 16px 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #16181d; } .ds-card-project-meta { margin: 4px 16px 16px; font-size: 13px; color: #5b616e; }

narrative.overview: The public site is a structural, confident document, not a decorative one. A near-black ink (#16181d) carries almost all the type and hairline structure; one vivid signal blue (#2563eb) is the single deliberate accent. Fraunces, a warm high-contrast serif, does the emotional heavy lifting in display type; Inter carries everything functional so the pairing reads as considered contrast, not two similar sans faces competing.
keyCharacteristics: One accent, used rarely and with intent — never sprinkled evenly.
Flat surfaces at rest; the blue glow shadow marks only the primary CTA and hero-level moments.
Serif display headlines carry personality; everything else is quiet Inter.
Motion choreographs entrances per-section rather than applying one uniform reveal everywhere.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue appears on at most one element per viewport at a time — a badge, a CTA glow, or one gradient headline, never more.

rules.name: The Serif-Only-At-Scale Rule
rules.body: Fraunces never appears below headline size; body and UI text is always Inter.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat and bordered at rest. A shadow only appears as a deliberate spotlight, never as ambient card decoration layered on top of a border.

dos: Do ration Signal Blue (#2563eb) to one element per viewport — badge, CTA glow, or one gradient headline, never more.
Do keep Fraunces exclusively at display/headline sizes; Inter for everything else.
Do keep cards flat with a hairline border at rest; add the glow shadow only to hero media and primary CTAs.
Do give every section entrance its own motion shape rather than one repeated reveal.
donts: Don't use gradient text as decoration outside the one sanctioned .text-gradient headline use.
Don't stack a tiny uppercase eyebrow label above every section.
Don't use numbered 01/02/03 scaffolding purely for visual rhythm.
Don't stack a visible 1px border together with a wide soft drop-shadow on the same card.
Don't round cards or media past 24px.
Don't touch the primary/ink admin token system — it is frozen.
